description_long: This is a medium-sized, open-topped wooden barrel with a rounded, slightly bulging body. The exterior is constructed from vertically aligned wooden staves, each with visible wood grain and subtle texturing, giving it a rustic appearance. Two wide, dark metal bands encircle the barrel horizontally, each reinforced with evenly spaced, prominent metal rivets. On opposite sides, there are sturdy metal ring handles attached to the upper band, designed for easy lifting or securing. The interior is hollow and appears unfinished, suitable for holding liquids or solid materials. The overall look suggests durability and functionality, making it ideal for urban or industrial settings.
description: A robust wooden barrel with dark metal bands and ring handles, featuring a rustic, reinforced design and an open top.
description_view_0: The barrel is shown with one metal ring handle visible on the left, highlighting the wood grain and the upper metal band with rivets.
description_view_1: This view centers on the barrel's body, showing both metal bands and rivets clearly, with no handles visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the barrel is shown, with the other metal ring handle visible on the right, emphasizing the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: The front view displays a metal ring handle attached to the upper band, directly facing the viewer, with both bands and rivets prominent.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops with rivets, upper and lower placement
